name: Acorn Squash with Cranberry Filling
recipeInstructions:
1. Prick the squash several times with a fork to allow steam to escape.
2. Place the squash in the oven and microwave on High (100%) until soft when tested with a fork, about 10 to 12 minutes. If your oven doesn't have a carousel, rotate and turn the squash after half the cooking time. Let stand.
3. Cut the squash in half and place the cut side up in a 10-inch square casserole dish.
4. In a small bowl, combine the cranberry sauce, honey, and ground allspice.
5. Microwave on High (100%) until hot and bubbly, about 3 to 4 minutes, stirring after half the cooking time.
6. Spoon the mixture into the squash halves.
7. Return the squash to the microwave and heat through for 2 to 3 minutes at High (100%).
